title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you questions related to the theme from Part 3. Express and develop your opinions with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on healthcare systems and personal responsibility.

questions.question: Should individuals or governments be more responsible for people's health?
Do you think people today are generally healthier than previous generations? Why?

script.text: Some people argue that free healthcare leads people to take less responsibility for their own health. Do you agree?
Thank you. That is the end of the test.
